originalTitle: The Tale of Ronin: Final Chapter
content: Ronin faces off against Red King's army in the animated finale of The Tale of Ronin 🔥 Read Volumes 1 & 2 of the manga in-game for the full tale! X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/ Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/ ENTER THE ARENA Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world! BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle! Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match. COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection! BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world. Compete for glory and rewards! SEASONAL EVENTS Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test! JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards! See you in the Arena! #ClashRoyale
chineseTitle: | 浪 | 人 | 传 | 说 | ： | 最 | 终 | 章 |
chineseContent: 在《浪人传说》的动画结局中，浪人与红王的军队对峙🔥 阅读游戏中漫画的第 1 卷和第 2 卷，了解完整的故事！ X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/ Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/ 进入竞技场 建立你的战斗套牌，并在快速实时战斗中智胜敌人。 《部落冲突》的创作者推出了一款实时多人战斗游戏，由您最喜欢的《部落冲突》角色等主演。开始与来自世界各地的玩家战斗！成为策略和牌组构建大师为您的战斗牌组选择独特的卡牌，前往竞技场进行战斗！在一场战略性的快节奏比赛中，将你的卡牌放在正确的位置，将敌人的国王和塔楼部队从他们的塔楼上击倒。收集并升级 100 多张卡牌野猪骑士！收集并升级 100 多张卡牌，其中包含您熟悉和喜爱的《部落冲突》部队、咒语和防御以及许多其他内容。赢得战斗并进入新竞技场，为您的收藏解锁强大的新卡牌！一路征战，登上顶峰 一路征战，晋级联赛和全球锦标赛，与世界上最优秀的选手一较高下。争夺荣耀和奖励！季节性活动 使用季票解锁新的季节性物品，如塔皮肤、表情和强大的魔法物品，并参加有趣的挑战，考验你的技能！加入部落并参战加入或与其他玩家组成部落，分享卡牌并在部落战争中战斗以获得丰厚奖励！竞技场见！ #皇室战争
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
